allow: Bash(python -c "from capdag.cap.definition import Cap; from capdag.urn.cap_urn import CapUrn; u = CapUrn.from_string\('cap:in=\\"media:void\\";out=\\"media:object\\";op=test'\); c = Cap\(u, 'T', 'cmd'\); print\(c.supported_model_types, c.default_model_spec\); c.supported_model_types = ['llm']; c.default_model_spec = 'gpt-4'; d = c.to_dict\(\); print\('to_dict keys:', list\(d.keys\(\)\)\); c2 = Cap.from_dict\(d\); print\('roundtrip:', c2.supported_model_types, c2.default_model_spec\)")
